loadingOverlay.title: Loading
loadingOverlay.description: Please wait while the app loads.

meta.title: NuxtStarter — Personal Nuxt Starter Template
meta.description: A personal Nuxt 4 starter for launching projects fast — bilingual i18n, typed API layer, Pinia, Nuxt UI, and production-ready defaults.

hero.title: NuxtStarter
hero.description: Your personal Nuxt 4 starter for launching projects fast. Bilingual support, a typed API layer, Pinia, and polished UI — without spending days on boilerplate.

features.title: What you get out of the box
features.description: A production-minded foundation so you can focus on your product, not project setup.

productionReady.title: Production-ready baseline
productionReady.description: Strict TypeScript, ESLint, Tailwind CSS v4, and {'@'}nuxtjs/seo configured upfront. Ship features, not scaffolding.

i18n.title: Bilingual by default
i18n.description: Persian (RTL) and English (LTR) with locale routing, browser detection, and number, date, and currency formatters.

performance.title: Fast by design
performance.description: SSR and SSG support, a prerendered home page, Nuxt Image, and automatic code splitting for quick loads.

ui.title: UI with Nuxt UI
ui.description: Nuxt UI design system with dark mode by default, consistent spacing, and accessible, responsive components.

themeToggle.title: Animated theme toggle
themeToggle.description: Telegram-style dark/light switch with a circular View Transition — light expands from the button, dark shrinks back to it.

dx.title: Smooth developer experience
dx.description: Auto-imports, strict TypeScript, a global $api plugin with error handling, and ready-made composables for API, i18n, and utilities.

scale.title: Built to grow
scale.description: Modular structure with Pinia, centralized error handling, runtime config, and an organized folder layout for larger apps.

stack.title: Pre-configured essentials
stack.description: The core stack every Nuxt project needs — installed and wired up for you.

nuxtUi.title: Nuxt UI
nuxtUi.description: Full design system with 100+ components, dark mode, typography, and an integrated icon system.

pinia.title: Pinia
pinia.description: Modern Vue state management with TypeScript support, devtools, and a modular store structure.

typescript.title: TypeScript
typescript.description: Strict mode and type checking enabled — type-safe from composables to components.

tailwind.title: Tailwind CSS
tailwind.description: Tailwind v4 with the Vite plugin, custom design tokens, and project utilities.

i18n.title: i18n
i18n.description: Multilingual with Persian (RTL) and English (LTR), locale routing, formatters, and cookie detection.

vueuse.title: VueUse
vueuse.description: Collection of essential Vue composables — local storage, scroll, window size, and more, already used across utility composables.

emblaCarousel.title: Embla Carousel
emblaCarousel.description: Lightweight, extensible carousel engine with a ready-made useAppCarousel composable for sliders, galleries, and swipeable content.

cta.title: Ready to start your next project?
cta.description: Clone the repo, set your environment variables, and start building today.
